## Meeting Purpose

[Provide hands-on training on building AI workflows using AirOps, with a focus on practical applications for Ramp employees.](https://fathom.video/share/xixmtKmXvCTNSWqiEyC44sHQ5UkjNgsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [AI workflows can significantly enhance productivity by automating complex tasks like research, content creation, and follow-ups](https://fathom.video/share/xixmtKmXvCTNSWqiEyC44sHQ5UkjNgsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Effective prompting techniques (e.g. chain of thought, role definition) are crucial for getting high-quality outputs from AI models](https://fathom.video/share/xixmtKmXvCTNSWqiEyC44sHQ5UkjNgsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
  - [AirOps platform enables non-technical users to build powerful AI workflows through a visual interface](https://fathom.video/share/xixmtKmXvCTNSWqiEyC44sHQ5UkjNgsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1411.0)
  - [Integrating company data and following data usage policies is important when implementing AI solutions at Ramp](https://fathom.video/share/xixmtKmXvCTNSWqiEyC44sHQ5UkjNgsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=12344.0)

## Topics

### Introduction to AI Workflows

  - [Marcel introduced the concept of AI workflows and their potential to automate complex tasks](https://fathom.video/share/xixmtKmXvCTNSWqiEyC44sHQ5UkjNgsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
  - [Emphasized the importance of decomposing work into "jobs to be done" and thinking from first principles](https://fathom.video/share/xixmtKmXvCTNSWqiEyC44sHQ5UkjNgsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=880.0)
  - [Highlighted the value of delegation skills in the AI era](https://fathom.video/share/xixmtKmXvCTNSWqiEyC44sHQ5UkjNgsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)

### AirOps Platform Overview

  - [Demonstrated key features: Grids, Workflows, Knowledge Bases, and Variables](https://fathom.video/share/xixmtKmXvCTNSWqiEyC44sHQ5UkjNgsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=4260.0)
  - [Explained different AI models available (GPT-4, Claude, Perplexity) and their strengths](https://fathom.video/share/xixmtKmXvCTNSWqiEyC44sHQ5UkjNgsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=4216.0)
  - [Showed how to build workflows using a visual interface with drag-and-drop components](https://fathom.video/share/xixmtKmXvCTNSWqiEyC44sHQ5UkjNgsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=4260.0)

### Prompt Engineering Techniques

  - [Covered best practices for writing effective prompts (role definition, context, task description)](https://fathom.video/share/xixmtKmXvCTNSWqiEyC44sHQ5UkjNgsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=8415.0)
  - [Demonstrated advanced techniques like chain of thought prompting](https://fathom.video/share/xixmtKmXvCTNSWqiEyC44sHQ5UkjNgsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=9392.0)
  - [Created a custom GPT "Prompting Teacher" to help participants improve their prompting skills](https://fathom.video/share/xixmtKmXvCTNSWqiEyC44sHQ5UkjNgsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=12149.0)

### Live Workflow Building

  - [Built several example workflows including:](https://fathom.video/share/xixmtKmXvCTNSWqiEyC44sHQ5UkjNgsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=12607.0)
      - [Page to FAQ generator](https://fathom.video/share/xixmtKmXvCTNSWqiEyC44sHQ5UkjNgsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=12607.0)
      - [Support question responder](https://fathom.video/share/xixmtKmXvCTNSWqiEyC44sHQ5UkjNgsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=12607.0)
      - [Call transcript to feature request analyzer](https://fathom.video/share/xixmtKmXvCTNSWqiEyC44sHQ5UkjNgsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=12607.0)
  - [Walked through the process of iteratively improving prompts and outputs](https://fathom.video/share/xixmtKmXvCTNSWqiEyC44sHQ5UkjNgsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=12607.0)

### Ramp-Specific Use Case: AE Follow-up Emails

  - [Collaborated with Dean to build a workflow for generating personalized follow-up emails after sales calls](https://fathom.video/share/xixmtKmXvCTNSWqiEyC44sHQ5UkjNgsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=12631.0)
  - [Integrated multiple data sources: call transcript, LinkedIn profiles, company info](https://fathom.video/share/xixmtKmXvCTNSWqiEyC44sHQ5UkjNgsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=12657.0)
  - [Demonstrated how to refine the output using Ramp's style guide and tone preferences](https://fathom.video/share/xixmtKmXvCTNSWqiEyC44sHQ5UkjNgsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=13926.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Participants to experiment with building their own workflows in AirOps](https://fathom.video/share/xixmtKmXvCTNSWqiEyC44sHQ5UkjNgsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=12293.0)
  - [Dean to refine the AE follow-up email workflow and reconvene with Marcel in 1-2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/xixmtKmXvCTNSWqiEyC44sHQ5UkjNgsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=12631.0)
  - [Explore options for deeper integration with Ramp's data sources (e.g. Salesforce, Gong) for more automated workflows](https://fathom.video/share/xixmtKmXvCTNSWqiEyC44sHQ5UkjNgsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=12344.0)
  - [Consider piloting the AE follow-up email tool with a small group of sales reps](https://fathom.video/share/xixmtKmXvCTNSWqiEyC44sHQ5UkjNgsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=12645.0)
